sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62262" key="leiotrixia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειο-τρῐχιάω</orth>, <sense id="n62262.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have smooth hair</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
